component.name: Galaxy Book Sound
component.summary: Native PipeWire equalizer and sound profiles for Galaxy Book notebooks on Fedora

description.p: Galaxy Book Sound is a native GTK4 and libadwaita helper for Fedora on Samsung Galaxy Book notebooks. It focuses on sound tuning through a native PipeWire filter-chain, 10-band equalization, ready-made profiles, and an Atmos-compatible preset toggle.

Hardware diagnostics and installation stay in the Galaxy Book Setup app. Galaxy Book Sound is the focused control surface for EQ and compatible spatial audio on this stack, without proprietary Atmos features.
